method: Curated reference graph -> influence plan -> experiment design -> generate -> critique -> memory/genome update

selfCritique.notes: Keep pushing arc progression with controlled novelty.

finalOutput.artistThinking: I am intrigued by the idea of emotional dissonance and how it can be visually represented through geometry. The challenge lies in balancing the warm and cool tones while maintaining a strong focus on the single dominant anchor. I want to create a piece that invites viewers to engage with the tension between structure and emotion, guiding their attention deliberately.
finalOutput.inspirationNote: The research on color contradictions and theatrical lighting has deeply influenced my approach. By employing a high-contrast palette with a muted counterweight, I aim to enhance the visual dynamics and emotional impact of my composition.
finalOutput.prompt: Art direction: minimal, geometric, system-oriented. Primary medium language: generative geometric composition. Core motifs: structure, constraint, precision. Arc context: Arc "Broken Protocols" step 3/4. Visual anchor directive: warm/cool collision with hard spotlight. Palette strategy: high-contrast with one muted counterweight. Composition strategy: single dominant anchor with asymmetric support. Conceptual center: emotional dissonance; counterpoint with attention as staging. Evolution target: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature. Deliberately avoid: flat lighting. Technique emphasis: dual-palette opposition + single-source emphasis; avoid drifting into Noise as Documentary Trace. Render one finished artwork only. No text overlays. No watermark. High detail. Cohesive composition.
finalOutput.rationale: Arc Broken Protocols step 3/4: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature.
